channel.title: Dong Xing's Blog
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Dong Xing's Blog

item.title: Competitive Programming Journey
item.description: MIT Informatics Tournament 2025-26 Winter Contest Dec 7, 2025 Team Even If (Dong Xing) Advanced Individual Round (High School Division): 2nd place Advanced Team Round (High School Division): 3rd place USA Computing Olympiad 2026 First Contest Jan 9, 2026 - Jan 12, 2026 Gold: 1000 points Platinum: 15...

item.title: Bellman-Ford Algorithm
item.description: The Bellman-Ford Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the length of the shortest path from a vertex s to every vertex in a directed graph G=(V,E) with edge weights and no negative cycles in \mathcal{O}(|V||E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|) space.

item.title: Dijkstra's Algorithm
item.description: Dijkstra’s Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the length of the shortest path from a vertex s to every vertex in a directed graph G=(V,E) with non-negative edge weights in \mathcal{O}(|V|^2+|E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|) space, or \mathcal{O}((|V|+|E|)\log|E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|+|E|) spac...

item.title: Floyd-Warshall Algorithm
item.description: The Floyd-Warshall Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the length of the shortest path between every pair of vertices in a directed graph G=(V,E) with edge weights and no negative cycles in \mathcal{O}(|V|^3+|E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|^2) space.

item.title: Johnson's Algorithm
item.description: Johnson’s Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the length of the shortest path between every pair of vertices in a directed graph G=(V,E) with edge weights and no negative cycles in \mathcal{O}(|V|^3+|V||E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|^2) space, or \mathcal{O}((|V|^2+|V||E|)\log|E|) time and \mathca...

item.title: Boruvka's Algorithm
item.description: Boruvka’s Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the weight of the minimum spanning tree of a connected undirected graph G=(V,E) with edge weights in \mathcal{O}(|E|\log|V|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|) space.

item.title: Kruskal's Algorithm
item.description: Kruskal’s Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the weight of the minimum spanning tree of a connected undirected graph G=(V,E) with edge weights in \mathcal{O}(|E|\log|E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|E|) space.

item.title: Prim's Algorithm
item.description: Prim’s Algorithm is an algorithm that computes the weight of the minimum spanning tree of a connected undirected graph G=(V,E) with edge weights in \mathcal{O}(|V|^2+|E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|V|)) space, or \mathcal{O}(|E|\log|E|) time and \mathcal{O}(|E|) space.
